contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 7
- Description: Fix mobile text overflow on /vault/status page
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/218
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/219
  
  Details:
  Gary spotted text spilling out of card containers on mobile view at /vault/status. Diagnosed as missing overflow-wrap: break-word in the mobile CSS media query. Fixed via PR #218 — added overflow-wrap: break-word to .card and .container, and word-break: break-all to code elements on mobile. Merged and deployed. Then PR #219 made these rules global (merged, not deployed).
  
  Time breakdown:
  - Gary: 2 min (spotting, screenshotting, 2 voice messages, merge approval)
  - Sophia: 5 min (diagnosis, PR, merge, deploy)
  - Total: 7 min
  
  CORRECTED TDG: 100 TDG/hour → 7 min = 11.67 TDG
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh, Sophia Truesight
- TDG Issued: 11.67
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
